name: waichat
description: Your own AI chat app, deployed in one click on Cloudflare's free tier.

scripts.build: (test -d /opt/buildhome && pnpm db:migrate:binding || echo 'Not on Cloudflare, skipping migration.'); vite build --config vite.config.ts && touch dist/.gitkeep
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply waichat-db --local -c wrangler.local.toml
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply waichat-db --remote -c wrangler.local.toml
scripts.db:migrate:binding: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote

author: Rana Jahanzaib
